info.description: Individual events with dates and booking links. Examples: Align & Amplify, scheduled retreats, one-off workshops, named speaking dates. Use search here to find a specific event. The four CATEGORY LANDING pages (Retreats, Workshops, Corporate Wellbeing, Speaking) live in a separate collection called 'Experiences · Sub-page'.

slug.description: URL path after the slash. Lowercase, hyphens-not-spaces, no punctuation. Auto-fills from the name/title — only edit if you want to change the URL.

description_v2.description: Main event description. Select text and click the link icon to add a hyperlink — a popup will ask you for the URL. Bold, italic, headings, lists and quotes all work from the toolbar.

date.description: Click the month name at top of the picker to jump months/years. Use the < > arrows to step one month at a time. Leave empty for evergreen items (no fixed date).

price.description: Amount in GBP (pounds and pence). Just the number — no currency symbol, no commas. Example: 49.99

price_label.description: Free-text price label shown to customers. Use this when you want to add nuance ('£49 / month', 'From £200', 'Investment by enquiry'). For straight one-off prices use the Price field too.

hero_image.description: Top banner photo for this page. Use a landscape JPG at least 1600x1000px. Smaller images will stretch and look blurry on big screens. PNG / HEIC work but JPG is half the file size.

booking_url.description: Where the 'Book now' button takes people. Paste a Calendly link (e.g. https://calendly.com/anna-annalouoflondon/discovery-call) and it opens as a popup so the customer stays on your site. Other URLs (Stripe checkout, internal pages, etc.) open normally. Leave blank to hide the button.

mailchimp_tag.description: Mailchimp tag applied when this experience is booked (via Calendly webhook or Stripe purchase). Must match a Mailchimp tag name EXACTLY (case-sensitive). Examples: 'Houseboat Retreat', 'Align & Amplify Attendee', 'Rise and Shine'. Leave blank to skip tagging.

is_active.description: Untick to HIDE this entry from the public site without deleting it. Useful for seasonal items or things you're drafting privately.

sort_order.description: Lower numbers show first. Use 10, 20, 30 (not 1, 2, 3) so you can drop new entries between existing ones without renumbering everything.

seo_title.description: Optional SEO title override (60 chars max). Leave blank to use the page/item name. Shown in Google search results and browser tabs.

seo_description.description: Short summary for Google and ChatGPT (1-2 sentences, ~155 chars). Write what someone searching for this would actually type. Fills in automatically when you Save — leave blank unless you want to override

upsells.description: Up to 3 'next step' cards shown at the bottom of this experience page. Leave empty to hide the upsell block entirely (Corporate Workshops show nothing).
